hero_trust: Real heartbeats. Real people. Real moments.
how_step1_desc: Your heartbeat is your fingerprint. We find people whose rhythms resonate with yours — no algorithms, just biology.
how_step2_desc: Send your actual heartbeat instead of a like. They'll feel your pulse — a moment of real intimacy before you even meet.
how_step3_desc: When two hearts send each other a beat at the same moment — that's a HeartBit. A signal you can't fake. A match worth meeting.
moment_desc_line1: When Xin taps Send Heart, you feel their pulse in real time.
moment_desc_line2: No swiping. No algorithm. Just biology.

matches_empty_title: Your first match is out there.
matches_empty_sub: Go discover someone whose heart beats like yours.
bond_meta_description: Feel {name}'s heartbeat in real time on HeartBits.
profile_meta_description: Manage your HeartBits profile and heartbeat sharing settings.
profile_share_desc: Let others feel your pulse while discovering
profile_gdpr_body: Your heart rate data is classified as special category biometric data under GDPR Article 9. It is processed only with your explicit consent, never sold, and encrypted end-to-end.
profile_no_consent: No consent given — heart rate sharing disabled
profile_demo_sub: HeartBits is opening soon. Join the waitlist to set up your profile, share your heartbeat, and connect with others.
profile_location_hint: Stored as approximate zone — exact GPS never saved
profile_withdraw_body_post: with all your matches. You can re-enable it at any time.
profile_delete_body: All your data will be permanently erased. Matches, bonds, and heartbeat history are gone forever. This cannot be undone.
consent_body_intro_pre: HeartBits measures and transmits your real-time heart rate to people you match with. Heart rate is
consent_body_intro_strong: biometric data protected under GDPR Article 9
consent_bullet_measure: Measure your heart rate via your device or wearable
consent_bullet_transmit: Transmit your heart rate to your matched partner in real time
consent_bullet_store: Store a record that you gave this consent (not your heart rate data — only that you agreed)
consent_withdrawal_pre: You can withdraw consent at any time from your profile. Withdrawing consent
consent_check_biometric: I understand my heart rate is biometric data and I explicitly consent to it being shared with my matches in real time.
consent_check_biometric_aria: I understand my heart rate is biometric data and I explicitly consent to it being shared with my matches in real time
consent_check_age_pre: I am 18 or older and have read the
consent_check_age_aria: I am 18 or older and have read the Privacy Policy
consent_decline: No thanks — I'll use HeartBits without heart rate sharing

login_tagline_line1: Sign in to discover people whose heartbeat
login_security_note: Secured with PKCE · Biometric data stays on your device
status_no_incidents: No incidents reported in the last 90 days
status_incident_history_pending: Incident history available once monitoring starts
about_meta_description: HeartBits is a dating app built around real human connection — your actual heartbeat.
about_lead: Every other dating app asks you to swipe on a photo. We ask you to feel a heartbeat.
about_para1: HeartBits uses your device and wearable sensors to share your real-time heart rate with people you match with. The "like" is sending your heartbeat. The match is two people whose hearts reach out at the same moment.
about_para2: We're building something that feels more like biology and less like browsing.
about_team_para: We're a small team obsessed with the idea that technology can create more human moments, not fewer.
privacy_meta_description: HeartBits privacy policy — how we handle your biometric and personal data.
privacy_intro: This policy explains what personal data HeartBits collects, why, how we protect it, and the rights you have. We designed HeartBits to collect as little as possible and to treat your most sensitive data — your heartbeat — with the highest level of protection.
privacy_s1_body_pre: HeartBits ("we", "us") operates the HeartBits dating platform and associated mobile applications, and is the data controller for the personal data described here. For any privacy matter, contact
privacy_s2_li1: Account & authentication — a stable account identifier from our authentication provider, plus your email and sign-in metadata (e.g. last login).
privacy_s2_li2: Heart rate (biometric) — real-time BPM transmitted to your match during a bond session. Relayed live and not stored on our servers.
privacy_s2_li3: Profile data — display name, date of birth (only an age band is shown to others), bio, gender, who you are seeking, and approximate location (geohash-6, ≈1.2 km — precise GPS coordinates are never stored).
privacy_s2_li4: Photos — images you upload, stored in a private bucket and served only via non-guessable URLs.
privacy_s2_li5: Activity — swipes, matches, bonds, and messages with your matches.
privacy_s2_li6: Consent records — that you consented, when, to which version, and the IP address at that time. Not the content of your heartbeat.
privacy_s2_li7: Technical data — IP address and basic device/session information needed to operate and secure the Service.
privacy_s3_body: Heart rate is biometric data classified as special category under GDPR Article 9. We process it only with your explicit consent, which you grant in-app before any heart rate sharing begins, and which you may withdraw at any time from your profile — withdrawal immediately ends sharing.
privacy_s4_li1: Explicit consent — for processing heart rate (biometric) data.
privacy_s4_li2: Performance of a contract — to create your account, show profiles, and enable matching and messaging.
privacy_s4_li3: Legitimate interests — to keep the Service secure, prevent abuse, and maintain an audit trail.
privacy_s4_li4: Legal obligation — where we must retain certain records to comply with the law.
privacy_s5_body: To provide the core service (profiles, discovery, matching, and live heartbeat sharing between consenting matches), to keep accounts and the platform secure, to respond to your requests, and to comply with our legal obligations. We do not sell your personal data, and we do not use it for third-party advertising.
privacy_s6_li1: Profile PII (name, date of birth, bio) is encrypted at rest using AES-256-GCM at the application layer.
privacy_s6_li2: Heart rate data is relayed in real time and never persisted to our database.
privacy_s6_li3: Location is stored only as a coarse geohash; precise GPS coordinates are rejected at the API boundary.
privacy_s6_li4: Per-row access controls isolate each user's data; photos live in a private store behind expiring, non-guessable URLs.
privacy_s6_li5: All data in transit is encrypted with TLS.
privacy_s7_body: Your profile and photos are visible to other users as part of discovery and to your matches. We share data with a small number of infrastructure providers (processors) strictly to run the Service — for example hosting, our authentication provider, and object storage — under appropriate data-processing terms. We do not sell or rent your data, and we share it with third parties only where required by law or to protect the rights and safety of users.
privacy_s8_body: We keep your data for as long as your account is active. Pausing your account hides it but keeps your data intact so you can return. Deleting your account immediately erases your personal data (profile fields are overwritten) and schedules permanent removal — including photos — within 30 days. Limited, anonymised audit records may be retained where required for security or legal compliance.
privacy_s9_intro: Under the GDPR and similar laws you have the right to:
privacy_s9_li1: access the personal data we hold about you;
privacy_s9_li3: erase your data ("right to be forgotten");
privacy_s9_li4: export your data in a portable format;
privacy_s9_li5: withdraw consent at any time (without affecting prior processing);
privacy_s9_li6: object to or restrict certain processing;
privacy_s9_li7: lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.
privacy_s9_body_pre: You can export or delete your data directly from your profile, or contact
privacy_s10_body: Where data is processed outside your country, we rely on appropriate safeguards (such as adequacy decisions or standard contractual clauses) to protect it.
privacy_s11_body: We use a single signed session cookie to keep you logged in. We do not use third-party advertising or tracking cookies.
privacy_s12_body: HeartBits is strictly for adults aged 18 and over. We do not knowingly collect data from anyone under 18; if we learn that we have, we will delete it.
privacy_s13_body: We may update this policy; material changes will be announced in-app or by email before they take effect.
terms_intro_pre: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of HeartBits — the web app, mobile apps, and related services (together, the "Service"). Please read them carefully. By creating an account or using the Service, you agree to these Terms and to our
terms_s1_body: By using HeartBits you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service. We may update these Terms from time to time; material changes will be announced in-app or by email before they take effect. Continued use after changes take effect constitutes acceptance.
terms_s2_body: You must be at least 18 years old and legally able to enter into a binding contract to use HeartBits. By registering you confirm that you meet these requirements, that the information you provide is accurate, and that you are not barred from using the Service under any applicable law. HeartBits is strictly for adults; we do not knowingly permit anyone under 18.
terms_s3_body: You register and sign in through our authentication provider. You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for all activity that occurs under your account. Provide accurate information and keep it up to date. One account per person; do not share, sell, or transfer your account.
terms_s4_li1: harass, threaten, stalk, defame, or harm other users;
terms_s4_li2: impersonate any person or misrepresent your identity, age, or affiliation;
terms_s4_li3: post or share content that is hateful, sexually exploitative, violent, or unlawful;
terms_s4_li4: involve, solicit, or share content concerning anyone under 18;
terms_s4_li5: use the Service for advertising, solicitation, spam, or any commercial purpose;
terms_s4_li6: collect, scrape, or harvest other users' data, or use bots/automated means;
terms_s4_li7: attempt to reverse-engineer, disrupt, overload, or circumvent the security of the Service;
terms_s4_li8: share another person's private or biometric information without their consent.
terms_s4_outro: We may remove content, and suspend or terminate accounts, that violate these Terms.
terms_s5_body: HeartBits' core feature shares live heart rate between matched users. Heart rate is biometric data and is transmitted in real time only between two matched users who have each given explicit consent. It is relayed live and is not stored on our servers. You grant this consent in-app before any sharing begins and may withdraw it at any time from your profile, which immediately ends sharing. See our Privacy Policy for details.
terms_s6_body: You retain ownership of the photos, profile text, and other content you provide ("Your Content"). You grant HeartBits a limited, non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to host, store, and display Your Content solely to operate and provide the Service to you and your matches. You are responsible for Your Content and confirm you have the rights to share it. We may remove content that violates these Terms.
terms_s7_body: HeartBits does not conduct criminal background checks on users and is not responsible for the conduct of any user. You are solely responsible for your interactions with others. Use good judgment, protect your personal information, and meet new people in safe, public settings. Report any user who violates these Terms.
terms_s8_body: You may pause your account at any time (it is hidden and reactivates when you log back in) or delete it permanently from your profile. Deletion erases your personal data and schedules permanent removal as described in our Privacy Policy. We may suspend or terminate your access if you breach these Terms or to protect the Service or other users. Provisions that by their nature should survive termination (e.g. disclaimers, limitation of liability) will survive.
terms_s9_body: HeartBits is provided "as is" and "as available", without warranties of any kind, express or implied. HeartBits is not a medical device. Heart rate readings are for entertainment and connection only and must not be used for medical, diagnostic, or fitness-decision purposes. We do not guarantee that you will find matches or that the Service will be uninterrupted or error-free.
terms_s10_body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, HeartBits and its operators will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or for any loss of data, profits, or goodwill, arising from your use of (or inability to use) the Service.
terms_s11_body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the operator's jurisdiction, without regard to conflict-of-law rules. Nothing in these Terms affects mandatory consumer-protection rights you may have under the law of your country of residence.
pitch_meta_description: HeartBits matches people whose heartbeat patterns naturally resonate — not algorithms, not swipe counts.
pitch_hero_sub_line1: Most apps match you on photos and prompts.
pitch_hero_sub_line2: HeartBits matches you on your heartbeat.
pitch_problem_title: Dating apps optimise for the wrong thing.
pitch_solution_title: Your heartbeat knows before you do.
pitch_solution_body: HeartBits reads your heart rate from Apple Watch or Android wearable and finds people whose rhythms naturally complement yours — not swipe counts, not bio keywords. Biology.
pitch_feature1_desc: Your biometric rhythm is your fingerprint. We surface people whose patterns resonate — not ranked by photo likes.
pitch_feature2_desc: When you match, share a real-time heartbeat channel. Watch your rhythms sync — the moment is always genuine.
pitch_feature3_desc: Biometric data is processed on-device. You actively consent before any heartbeat is transmitted. Always.
pitch_feature4_desc: Native Apple Watch + iPhone, Android Wear + phone, and full web. One experience across all your devices.
pitch_screens_title: Explore every screen, no account needed.
pitch_screen_discover_desc: Swipe profiles matched by heart rhythm
pitch_screen_bond_desc: Watch your heartbeats sync in real time
pitch_cta_platforms: iOS · Android · Web · Apple Watch · Wear OS
home_meta_description: HeartBits — the dating app that puts your heart first. Share your real heartbeat with your matches. No swipes, just biology.
home_og_description: The dating app that puts your heart first. Literally. Share your real-time heartbeat with your matches.
privacy_cookies_intro: HeartBits uses only strictly-necessary and functional cookies — no advertising or third-party tracking, so no consent banner is required. The cookies we set:
privacy_cookies_li2: Sign-in security — short-lived cookies that protect the login flow.
privacy_cookies_li3: Preview access — remembers you've entered the private preview.
privacy_cookies_li4: Heartbeat consent — remembers your choice to share your live heart rate.
